data.biography:
Kristen Joy Schaal (/ʃɑːl/; born January 24, 1978) is an American actress, voice actress, comedian, and writer. She is best known for her voice roles as Louise Belcher on Bob's Burgers and Mabel Pines on Gravity Falls, as well as for playing Mel on Flight of the Conchords, Hurshe Heartshe on The Heart, She Holler and Carol Pilbasian on The Last Man on Earth. She provides several voices for BoJack Horseman, most notably for the character of Sarah Lynn, for which she was nominated for a Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Character Voice-Over Performance. Other roles include Amanda Simmons on The Hotwives of Orlando, Hazel Wassername on 30 Rock, Victoria Best on WordGirl, Trixie in the Toy Story franchise, and Anne on Wilfred. She was an occasional commentator on The Daily Show from 2008 to 2016. She voiced Sayrna in the 2019 EA video game, Anthem.  Schaal was born in Longmont, Colorado, to a Lutheran family of Dutch ancestry. She was raised on her family's cattle ranch, in a rural area near Boulder, Colorado. Her father is a construction worker and her mother is a secretary.

Schaal attended Skyline High School where she graduated in 1996. She has a brother, David, who is three years older. She graduated from Northwestern University and then moved to New York in 2000 to pursue a comedy career. In 2005, she had her first break when she was included in the New York article "The Ten Funniest New Yorkers You've Never Heard Of".

data.name: Kristen Schaal

data.biography:
Kristen Joy Schaal (* 24. Januar 1978 in Longmont, Colorado) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin, Autorin und Komikerin. Bekannt wurde sie besonders durch ihre Rolle in der Fernsehserie Flight of the Conchords und als Komikerin und Autorin in der Daily Show.

Nach ihrem Abschluss an der Northwestern University zog Schaal nach New York City. 2005 listete das New York Magazine sie unter den „Zehn lustigsten New Yorkern, von denen Sie noch nie gehört haben“. 2006 gewann sie einen Preis beim US Comedy Arts Festival in Aspen im US-Bundesstaat Colorado sowie den Andy-Kaufman-Preis beim New York Comedy Festival, den Preis als beste weibliche Stand-up-Komikerin der 2006 Nightlife Awards in New York sowie bei den 2007 ECNY Awards. Beim Melbourne International Comedy Festival 2008 gewann sie den Barry Award gemeinsam mit Nina Conti.

2006 trat Schaal in der ersten Staffel der Comedy-Central-Show Live at Gotham auf. Sie komoderiert die wöchentliche Variete-Show Hot Tub im Comix Comedy Club und tritt im Peoples Improv Theater auf. Schaal ist Gründungsmitglied der Theatertruppe The Striking Viking Story Pirates, die Geschichten von Kindern in Sketchen und Liedern verarbeitet.

Beim Edinburgh Fringe 2007 trat Schaal live auf und wurde als eine von sechs aus mehr als zweihundert amerikanischen Darbietungen dort eingeladen, in einer vom US-Generalkonsulat gesponserten Auswahl aufzutreten. Schaal trat auch in der Royal Albert Hall auf, im Rahmen des The Secret Policeman’s Ball 2008 sowie beim Bonnaroo 2009 Music Festival. 2010 war Schaal als Stand-up Komikerin in John Olivers New York Stand Up Show zu sehen, sowie beim Solid Sound Festival im Massachusetts Museum of Contemporary Art.

Im 2014 erschienenen Musikvideo zu Weird Al Yankovics Tacky, einer Parodie auf Pharrell Williams Happy, ist Schaal ebenfalls vertreten.
Kristen Joy Schaal (Longmont, Colorado, 24 de gener de 1978) és una actriu, còmica i escriptora nord-americana, coneguda per la seva distintiva veu infantil.

data.biography: Isabel May to młoda amerykańska aktorka, urodzona 21 listopada 2000 roku w Santa Monica, Kalifornia. Zaczynała swoją karierę od roli Katie Cooper w popularnym serialu Netflix „Alexa & Katie”, gdzie wcielała się w główną bohaterkę przez trzy sezony. Wkrótce potem pojawiła się w serialu „Młody Sheldon”, grając postać Veroniki Duncan.  Wielkim krokiem w jej karierze była rola Elsy Dutton w „1883”, prequelu serialu „Yellowstone”, która przyniosła jej uznanie krytyków i zyskała jej popularność wśród widzów. Aktorka zdobyła również nagrodę za najlepszą rolę w miniserialu. W 2024 roku ogłoszono, że Isabel dołączy do obsady nadchodzącego filmu „Scream 7”, gdzie zagra córkę jednej z głównych postaci. Jej kariera nabiera tempa, a jej talent jest coraz szerzej doceniany.

data.biography:
Peter Szymon Serafinowicz (born July 10, 1972) is an English actor, comedian, director and screenwriter. His film roles include the voice of Darth Maul in Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace (1999), Pete in Shaun of the Dead (2004), Garthan Saal in Guardians of the Galaxy (2014), the voice of Big Daddy in Sing (2016) and Sing 2 (2021), and The Sommelier in John Wick: Chapter 2 (2017).

On television, Serafinowicz created and starred in the comedy shows Look Around You (2002–2005) and The Peter Serafinowicz Show (2007–2008). He also voiced characters and worked as a creative consultant on South Park (2006–2015), portrayed Edgar Covington in Parks and Recreation (2013–2015), voiced the Fisher King in Doctor Who (2015), and starred as the title character in the live-action adaptation series The Tick (2016). His other television work includes voicing characters in animated series such as Archer, Bob's Burgers, Rick and Morty, The Simpsons, American Dad!, and the second season of What If...?, reprising his live-action role as Garthan Saal.

Serafinowicz has voiced characters in video games such as Dark Souls II (2014), LittleBigPlanet 3 (2014), and Deus Ex: Mankind Divided (2016). He has also directed music videos for acts such as Hot Chip and went viral in 2016 for political satire videos in which he dubbed over videos of Donald Trump with a "sassy" voice, a Cockney accent, and a posh English accent.
data.name: Peter Serafinowicz

data.biography:
Alison Wright, 12 Temmuz 1976 tarihinde Sunderland, Tyne and Wear, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Evlatlık edinilen ve İngiltere'de büyüyen Wright, küçük yaşlarda dansa ve oyunculuğa ilgi duymaya başladı. Eğitimini prestijli Lee Strasberg Theatre and Film Institute'da tamamlamak üzere New York'a taşındı. Kariyerinin ilk yıllarında tiyatro sahnelerinde boy gösterdi ve garsonluk yaparak geçimini sağladı; sinemaya ise "The Nanny Diaries" (2007) gibi filmlerdeki küçük rollerle adım attı.

Wright'ın kariyerini kökten değiştiren ve onu uluslararası bir isim haline getiren proje, FX'in soğuk savaş dönemini anlatan casusluk draması "The Americans" (2013-2017) oldu. Dizide canlandırdığı FBI sekreteri Martha Hanson karakteri, başlangıçta kısa süreli bir rol olarak planlanmıştı. Ancak Wright'ın karaktere kattığı derinlik ve trajik kırılganlık, rolün dört sezon boyunca devam etmesini sağladı. Bu performansıyla eleştirmenlerin övgüsünü kazandı ve 2017 yılında "Drama Dizisinde En İyi Konuk Kadın Oyuncu" dalında Primetime Emmy Ödülü'ne aday gösterildi.

Bu başarısının ardından Ryan Murphy'nin antoloji dizisi "Feud: Bette and Joan"da (2017) Pauline Jameson karakteriyle yer aldı ve çok yönlülüğünü kanıtladı. Aynı dönemde Amazon yapımı "Sneaky Pete" (2015-2019) dizisinde Marjorie rolüyle ve Ben Affleck ile başrolü paylaştığı "Hesaplaşma" (The Accountant) (2016) filmindeki Justine karakteriyle dikkat çekti.

Televizyon dünyasındaki bir diğer büyük başarısı, kıyamet sonrası bilimkurgu dizisi "Snowpiercer" (2020-2024) ile geldi. Dizide, trenin düzenini sağlamaktan sorumlu olan Ruth Wardell karakterini canlandırdı. Katı kurallara bağlı bir bürokrattan, halkın yanında yer alan bir lidere dönüşen karakterin evrimini dört sezon boyunca başarıyla yansıttı ve dizinin en sevilen yüzlerinden biri oldu.

2024 ve 2025 yılları, Alison Wright'ın hem televizyon hem de sinema projelerinde aktif olduğu bir dönem oldu. Ryan Murphy ile işbirliğini sürdürerek "Feud: Capote vs. The Swans" (2024) dizisinde Pamela Harriman'ı canlandırdı. 2025 yılında vizyona giren ve Dan Trachtenberg'in yönettiği bilimkurgu-aksiyon filmi "Predator: Badlands" kadrosunda yer aldı. Filmde, Weyland-Yutani şirketinin yapay zeka yöneticisi olan "MU/TH/UR 062578" karakterini seslendirerek "Alien" evrenine de bir selam gönderdi. Ayrıca, 2016 yapımı filmin devamı olan "The Accountant 2" (2025) projesinde de rol aldı. Wright, New York'ta yaşamaya ve hem sahne hem de ekran çalışmalarına devam etmektedir.

2015年，主演个人首部电视剧《那年青春我们正好》并正式进入演艺圈；同年，参演了玄幻电视剧《幻城》。2016年，主演了现代奇幻网络剧《我不是妖怪》。2017年，主演青春电影《草样年华》和悬疑刑侦网络剧《法医秦明2清道夫》。2019年，主演美食题材都市青春剧《舌尖上的心跳》。2020年11月23日，主演的悬疑探案剧《心宅猎人》在爱奇艺上线。
data.name: 刘冬沁

data.biography: Lưu Đông Thấm, sinh ngày 9 tháng 1 năm 1994 tại Trường Sa, Hồ Nam, là một nam diễn viên của Trung Quốc đại lục. Anh tốt nghiệp khoa diễn xuất của Học viện Hý kịch Thượng Hải. data.biography:
Khalifa Natour is an Israeli Arab actor. Born in Qalansawe in 1965-1966, Natour attended Beit Zvi School for the Performing Arts where he played Othello and Timon of Athens (among other roles) in student productions. He graduated from Beit Zvi in 1991. Since then he has performed on the stage and in films, both inside and outside Israel. His film credits include The Band's Visit (2007), The Other Son (2012), and Tikkun (2015). He has one of the lead roles in season three (2020) of the Netflix television series Fauda.

Source: Article "Khalifa Natour" from Wikipedia in English, licensed under CC-BY-SA 3.0.

data.biography:
Khalifa Natour est un acteur arabe israélien de cinéma, de théâtre et de télévision, né en 1964 ou 1965 à Qalansawe (Kalansua) dans la région du Triangle. Diplômé de l’école Beit Zvi des arts du spectacle, il a joué dans de nombreuses pièces de théâtre en Israël, en Cisjordanie et à l'étranger. Il a un rôle important dans Le Fils de l'autre de Lorraine Lévy.

Au théâtre, il a joué entre autres aux côtes de Makram Khoury dans la pièce 11 and 12 de Peter Brook inspirée de la vie du mystique Tierno Bokar.

Source: Article "Khalifa Natour" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

data.biography:
Carla María Campra Elizalde (Barcelona, 16 de abril de 1999), es una actriz española conocida especialmente por su participación en la serie de Antena 3, 90-60-90, diario secreto de una adolescente. También actuó en la telenovela Yo soy Bea, y en Águila Roja junto a su hermano Guillermo Campra.

Participó como modelo de pasarela en diferentes shows de TV, (en El Club de TV3 y Corazón, corazón de TVE, entre otros) desfilando bañadores de Anaís, ropa Mayoral y otras marcas. Hizo anuncios publicitarios para diferentes marcas, pero no fue hasta 2007 cuando hizo su primera aparición en la película Atlas de geografía humana. En 2008 participó en la serie Cazadores de hombres y esporádicamente como hija de una de las protagonistas en Yo soy Bea. Un año después entró a formar parte del reparto de la serie de Antena 3, 90-60-90, diario secreto de una adolescente, como Julia.

En 2010, interpretó a Mariona en la secuela de la TV Movie La Mari, La Mari 2; ese mismo año obtuvo el papel en la serie de Antena 3, No soy como tú. En 2011 apareció en la segunda parte de la TV Movie La duquesa interpretando a Eugenia Martínez de Irujo. Ese mismo año consiguió su primer papel protagonista en el cine con la película El sueño de Iván, también protagonizada por Óscar Casas. Aparte, en 2011 hizo dos cortos: Viernes, junto a Óscar Casas y Miliki, y 3D.

Carla María Campra Elizalde (Barcelona, April 16, 1999), is a Spanish actress known especially for her participation in the Antena 3 series, 90-60-90, secret diary of a teenager. She also acted in the telenovela Yo soy Bea, and in Águila Roja with her brother Guillermo Campra.
data.name: Carla Campra

data.biography:
Carla Campra (* 1999) ist eine spanische Schauspielerin. Für ihre Rolle in "90-60-90, diario secreto de una adolescente" erhielt sie früh öffentliche Anerkennung.

1999 in Barcelona geboren, zog sie Jahre später mit ihrer Familie nach Boadilla del Monte. Sie hat einen älteren Bruder, Guillermo, der sich ebenfalls der Schauspielerei verschrieben hat.

Ihr Spielfilmdebüt gab sie 2007 mit ihrer Rolle in dem Drama Atlas de geografía humana, während sie 2008 ihr Fernsehdebüt mit einer kleinen Rolle in der Serie Cazadores de hombres hatte. Sie trat in mehr als 40 Folgen der TV-Serie Yo soy Bea auf und spielte die junge Paloma, und sie bekam auch eine Hauptrolle in der Serie 90-60-90, Diario secreto de una adolescente, die ihre Schauspielkarriere voranbrachte. Es folgten Gastauftritte in Serien wie El secreto de Puente Viejo, Centro médico und El hombre de tu vida. Campra trat auch in La otra mirada und Señoras del (H)AMPA auf. Neben einer Hauptrolle im zweiten Teil des Fernsehfilms La duquesa als Eugenia Martínez de Irujo gehören zu ihren Filmen Auftritte in dem Kinderfilm El sueño de Iván, Verónica und Everybody Knows, in dem sie die Tochter der Figur von Penélope Cruz spielte.

Im Jahr 2020 trat Campra der Besetzung der täglichen Seifenoper Acacias 38 bei, um Daniela zu spielen, und trat später der Produktion der Netflix-Fantasy-Thriller-Serie Feria bei.

Rory Kinnear (born February 17, 1978) is an English actor and playwright who has worked with the Royal Shakespeare Company and the Royal National Theatre.

He is best known for playing Bill Tanner in the James Bond films Quantum of Solace, Skyfall, and Spectre, and in various video games of the franchise. He is the youngest actor to play the role of Bill Tanner. He also won a Laurence Olivier Award for portraying Fopling Flutter in a 2008 version of The Man of Mode, and a British Independent Film Award for his performance in the 2012 film Broken. In 2014, he won the Olivier Award for Best Actor for his portrayal of Shakespeare's villain Iago in the National Theatre production of Othello.
data.name: Rory Kinnear

data.biography:
Rory Kinnear wurde als Sohn des Schauspielerehepaares Roy Kinnear und Carmel Cryan geboren. Er hat zwei Geschwister. Sein Vater starb, als Rory zehn Jahre alt war. Er studierte Schauspielerei an der London Academy of Music and Dramatic Art und ist seit 2002 in verschiedenen Fernsehproduktionen als Schauspieler zu sehen. Zudem ist er als Theaterschauspieler aktiv. Einem breiteren internationalen Publikum wurde Kinnear bekannt, als er 2008 in James Bond 007: Ein Quantum Trost die Rolle von Ms Assistenten Bill Tanner übernahm, die er auch in James Bond 007: Skyfall (2012) und James Bond 007: Spectre (2015) verkörperte. Diese Figur war zuvor von Michael Kitchen zuletzt in James Bond 007 – Die Welt ist nicht genug (1999) dargestellt worden. Auch an dem Computerspiel 007 Legends aus dem Jahr 2012 war Kinnear als Synchronsprecher von Tanner beteiligt. Seit 2014 ist er in einer wiederkehrenden Rolle in der Serie Penny Dreadful zu sehen.

Bei den British Independent Film Awards 2012 erhielt Kinnear die Auszeichnung als Bester Nebendarsteller für seine Rolle in Broken.

Rory Kinnear /ˈɹɔːɹi kɪnɪə(ɹ)/1, né le 17 février 1978 à Londres (Angleterre), est un acteur et dramaturge britannique. Il est connu du grand public pour son rôle de Bill Tanner dans les films de James Bond, Quantum of Solace, Skyfall, Spectre et Mourir peut attendre.

Rory Kinnear est né dans une famille d’artistes, ses parents (Roy Kinnear et Carmel Cryan) étant tous les deux comédiens. Le petit Rory les accompagne régulièrement sur les tournées de théâtre et sur les plateaux de tournage.

Sa première expérience devant une caméra, l’acteur la fait à l’âge de 8 ans en jouant dans une publicité. En 1988, un drame frappe le jeune Rory, alors âgé de 8 ans. Son père décède victime d’un accident de cheval en plein tournage du Retour des Mousquetaires en Espagne. Cette tragédie éloigne Rory de la comédie pendant 5 ans. C’est à l’âge de 15 qu’il reprend goût au jeu avec la pièce Cyrano de Bergerac qu’il interprète pour son école. L’artiste reçoit de nombreux éloges qui le motivent à continuer dans cette voie.

Le britannique ne néglige toutefois pas ses études et intègre la prestigieuse université d’Oxford pour y obtenir un diplôme d’anglais. C’est après cela qu’il décide d’entrer à la London Academy of Music and Dramatic Art afin de réaliser ses ambitions de comédien. A sa sortie, le comédien devient membre de la Royal Shakespeare Company et débute une prolifique carrière d’acteur de théâtre. Il joue également en parallèle pour la télévision et se fait remarquer du public en 2008 pour sa prestation dans le biopic Sur les marches du pouvoir. Kinnear y incarne Denis Thatcher, l’époux de l’ex-premier ministre controversé de Grande-Bretagne, Margaret Thatcher.

Son palmarès lui vaut d’être engagé la même année dans le deuxième opus de la franchise James Bond interprétée par Daniel Craig, Quantum of Solace. Sa carrure et son flegme britannique sont appréciés par le réalisateur Marc Forster qui lui confie le rôle de Bill Tanner, chef d’Etat-Major de M au MI-6. Le comédien enfile à nouveau le costume de ce personnage emblématique des services secrets de sa majesté dans le carton Skyfall en 2012 et dans le très attendu Spectre en 2015, cette fois sous la direction de Sam Mendes.

Le britannique impose également son physique à la fois robuste et débonnaire dans le drame Broken aux côtés de Tim Roth et dans le nommé aux Oscars Imitation Game. Il campe l’inspecteur Robert Nock dans ce dernier et surveille les activités du mathématicien de génie Alan Turing (Benedict Cumberbatch), chargé de décrypter la machine Enigma durant la seconde guerre mondiale.

En parallèle du tournage de Spectre en 2015, le comédien rejoint le casting de Penny Dreadful, série d’épouvante-horreur avec la magnétique et sublime Eva Green, ex-James Bond Girl de Casino Royale. Kinnear y campe La Créature

在进入伦敦音乐戏剧学院学习并于2001年毕业之前，罗里·金奈尔在牛津大学攻读英国语言文学专业。金奈尔的父亲罗伊·金奈尔也是一名演员，他的教父则是朱迪·丹奇的已故丈夫迈克尔·威廉姆斯。金奈尔近年来一直活跃在伦敦国立剧院，而且受到艺术剧导演尼克·海特奈尔的青睐。他最近在《南华克市绯闻》中饰演西蒙的表演大获好评，而在重新排演的喜剧《时髦男士》中饰演弗普林·弗拉特爵士，在《菲利斯泰恩》中饰演皮奥特。

　　除了舞台演出外，金奈尔还不断参加电视演出。他最近的演出包括在BBC一台的电视剧《五天迷踪》中饰演一名绑架儿童的犯罪分子，以及在根据简·奥斯丁著作改编的电视剧《曼斯菲尔德庄园》饰演拉什沃斯。金奈尔最新出演的BBC电视剧为《玛格丽特·撒切尔：前往芬奇利的长征》。

　　《量子危机》是罗里·金奈尔的大屏幕处女作。

在進入倫敦音樂戲劇學院學習並於 2001 年畢業之前，羅裏·金奈爾在牛津大學攻讀英國語言文學專業。金奈爾的父親羅伊·金奈爾也是一名演員，他的教父則是朱迪·丹奇的已故丈夫邁克爾·威廉姆斯。金奈爾近年來一直活躍在倫敦國立劇院，而且受到藝術劇導演尼克·海特奈爾的青睞。他最近在《南華克市緋聞》中飾演西蒙的表演大獲好評，而在重新排演的喜劇《時髦男士》中飾演弗普林·弗拉特爵士，在《菲利斯泰恩》中飾演皮奧特。

除了舞台演出外，金奈爾還不斷參加電視演出。他最近的演出包括在 BBC 一台的電視劇《五天迷蹤》中飾演一名綁架兒童的犯罪分子，以及在根據簡·奧斯丁著作改編的電視劇《曼斯菲爾德莊園》飾演拉什沃斯。金奈爾最新出演的 BBC 電視劇為《瑪格麗特·撒切爾：前往芬奇利的長征》。

《量子危機》是羅裏·金奈爾的大屏幕處女作。

data.biography:
Ο Ρόρι Κινίαρ (Rory Kinnear) είναι Άγγλος ηθοποιός. Είναι περισσότερο γνωστός για τον ρόλο του Βρετανού πρωθυπουργού Nicol Trowbridge στην επιτυχημένη σειρά του Netflix «The Diplomat». Έχει κερδίσει δύο βραβεία Olivier, και τα δύο στο Εθνικό Θέατρο, το 2008 για την ερμηνεία του στον Σερ Φόπλινγκ Φλάτερ στο The Man of Mode και για τον ρόλο του κακού του Ουίλιαμ Σαίξπηρ, Ιάγκο, στον Οθέλλο το 2014.

Έπαιξε τον Μπιλ Τάνερ σε τέσσερις ταινίες του Τζέιμς Μποντ: Quantum of Solace (2008), Skyfall (2012), Spectre (2015) και No Time to Die (2021) και σε διάφορα βιντεοπαιχνίδια του franchise. Άλλοι κινηματογραφικοί του ρόλοι περιλαμβάνουν το Broken (2012), για το οποίο κέρδισε ένα βρετανικό βραβείο ανεξάρτητου κινηματογράφου, The Imitation Game (2014), Men (2022) και Bank of Dave (2023).

Οι τηλεοπτικοί ρόλοι περιλαμβάνουν τον Μάικλ Κάλοου στο ντεμπούτο επεισόδιο της ανθολογίας Black Mirror, τον Εθνικό Ύμνο (2011), τον Μάικλ Μπέικερ στην κωμική σειρά Count Arthur Strong (2013–2017), τον Λόρδο Λούκαν στο θρίλερ δύο μερών Lucan (2013), Πλάσματα στο δράμα τρόμου Penny Dreadful (2014–2016) και Stephen στη δυστοπική μίνι σειρά Years and Years (2019).
data.name: Ρόρι Κινίαρ

data.biography:
Rory Kinnear, 17 Şubat 1978 tarihinde Londra, İngiltere'de, tanınmış karakter oyuncusu Roy Kinnear ve aktris Carmel Cryan'ın oğlu olarak dünyaya gelmiştir. Sanatla iç içe bir ailede büyümesine rağmen başlangıçta oyunculuğu bir kariyer olarak düşünmemiş, Oxford Üniversitesi'nde İngilizce eğitimi almıştır. Ancak daha sonra oyunculuk tutkusunu takip etmeye karar vererek London Academy of Music and Dramatic Art (LAMDA)'da eğitim görmüştür.

Kariyerinin temelini tiyatro sahnesinde atan Kinnear, kuşağının en saygın ve yetenekli sahne oyuncularından biri olarak kabul edilmektedir. Royal Shakespeare Company ve Royal National Theatre gibi prestijli topluluklarla çalışmış, özellikle Shakespeare rollerindeki performansıyla büyük beğeni toplamıştır. "Othello" oyunundaki Iago rolüyle Laurence Olivier Ödülü'nü kazanması, sahnedeki başarısının en önemli göstergelerinden biridir.

Sinema seyircisi tarafından en çok tanındığı rol, James Bond serisinde canlandırdığı MI6'in Kurmay Başkanı Bill Tanner karakteridir. Bu rolü ilk olarak "Quantum of Solace" (2008) filminde üstlenmiş, ardından "Skyfall" (2012), "Spectre" (2015) ve "No Time to Die" (Ölmek İçin Zaman Yok) (2021) filmlerinde de sürdürerek serinin modern döneminin ayrılmaz bir parçası olmuştur. Ayrıca "Yapay Oyun" (The Imitation Game) (2014) ve Alex Garland'ın yönettiği korku filmi "Men" (2022) gibi yapımlarda da önemli roller üstlenmiştir.

Kinnear, televizyondaki etkileyici ve çeşitli rolleriyle de tanınmaktadır. Charlie Brooker'ın antoloji dizisi "Black Mirror"ın (2011) unutulmaz ilk bölümü "The National Anthem"de canlandırdığı Başbakan Michael Callow rolüyle hafızalara kazınmıştır. Gotik korku dizisi "Penny Dreadful"da (2014-2016) canlandırdığı trajik "Yaratık" (The Creature) karakteriyle eleştirmenlerden tam not almıştır. Son dönemde ise "Our Flag Means Death" (2022-2023) adlı komedi dizisindeki ve "The Diplomat" (2023) adlı politik gerilim dizisindeki rolleriyle de beğeni toplamıştır.

Hem sahnede hem de ekranda derinlikli ve zeki performanslar sergileme yeteneğiyle bilinen Rory Kinnear, günümüzün en çok yönlü ve saygın İngiliz aktörlerinden biridir.

焦俊艳，演员，毕业于北京电影学院表演系本科班，北京拾捌文化经纪有限公司签约艺人。

2009年出演电影处女作《肩上蝶》受到关注，2011年在爱情电影《失恋33天》 中饰演冯佳期 。2012年接拍电视剧《新编辑部故事》、《杜拉拉之似水年华》被观众所熟知。2013年主演热门小说改编剧《遇见王沥川》赢得书迷一致好评并受到广泛关注，2014年因主演热播剧《幸福36计》  中的李闻雨一角受到观众的喜爱。2014年主演惊悚电影《笔仙3》和悬疑电影《平安岛》，同年参演宁浩导演作品《心花路放》。2015年主演湖南卫视热播剧《青春集结号》，剧中伶牙俐齿展鬼马一面；同年主演电视剧诛仙《青云志》饰演合欢派金瓶儿。

2016年主演文章电影导演处女作《陆垚知马俐》饰演方灰灰，  同年主演搜狐自制刑侦类大IP网剧《法医秦明》饰演大宝，同年主演热血女权话题超级大剧《问题餐厅》饰演问题餐厅率真女店长唐玉。2017年主演曾国祥导演、陈可辛监制的贺岁喜剧电影《玲姐大闹萌贵坊》。 同年主演阮惟新执导、郭博雅编剧的都市悬疑推理剧《超感》饰演古静。

data.biography:
John Doe (born John Nommensen Duchac on February 25, 1954 in Decatur, Illinois) is an American singer, songwriter, actor, poet and bass player. Doe founded the much-praised L.A. punk band X, of which he is still an active member. His musical compositions and performances span the rock, country and folk music genres. As an actor, he has dozens of television appearances and several movies to his credit, including the role of Jeff Parker in the television series Roswell.

In addition to X, Doe performs with the country-folk-punk band The Knitters and has released records as a solo artist. In the early 1980s, he performed on two albums by The Flesh Eaters.

In the 1989 biopic Great Balls of Fire!, Doe played Jerry Lee Lewis's cousin-turned-father-in-law J. W. Brown. Doe starred in the 1992 film Roadside Prophets and in the 1998 short Lone Greasers. Other movie acting credits include Road House, Vanishing Point, Salvador, Boogie Nights, The Specials, The Good Girl, Gypsy 83 and Pure Country. As a musician with X, he has two feature-length concert films, several music videos, and an extended performance-and-interview sequence in The Decline of Western Civilization, Penelope Spheeris's seminal documentary about the early-1980s L.A. punk scene.

Along with co-writer Exene Cervenka, Doe composed most of the songs recorded by X. Wild Gift, an album from that band's heyday, was named "Record of the Year" by Rolling Stone, The Los Angeles Times, and The New York Times. With Dave Alvin, he co-wrote two of the songs on the Blasters' 1984 album Hard Line, "Just Another Sunday" and "Little Honey".

In the 1992 movie The Bodyguard (starring Kevin Costner and Whitney Houston), it was Doe's version of "I Will Always Love You" that plays on the jukebox when Costner and Houston's characters are dancing. It was released on audio cassette by Warner Bros. in September 1992, but is difficult to obtain (though bootleg copies can be downloaded from the Internet). No version is believed to have been released on CD.

"The Meanest Man in the World" by Doe was featured in Season 4 of the television series Friday Night Lights and included on the second soundtrack album.

John Doe released an album with Canadian indie rock band The Sadies called Country Club on April 14, 2009. The album features covers of country classics along with original songs.

data.biography:
Tony Robbins (born Anthony Jay Mahavoric, ht: 6'8") is an European-American author, coach, speaker, and philanthropist; he is of Croatian-American heritage. He is known for his infomercials, seminars, and self-help books including the books Unlimited Power and Awaken the Giant Within. He's also known for his role in the film Shallow Hal as himself, and appeared in Men in Black as an alien being watched on a monitor. He wears size 18 8E shoes.

His parents divorced when he was 7 and his mother remarried several times, including a marriage with Jim Robbins, a former semi-professional baseball player who legally adopted Anthony when he was 12. During high school, Robbins grew ten inches in a year, a growth spurt later attributed to a pituitary tumor.

When he was 17 years old, he left home and never returned. Robbins later worked as a janitor, and did not attend college. One day he asked the landlord on site, who was a family friend, about how he became so successful. The landlord then told him that he started to turn his life around after going to a Jim Rohn seminar.

Robbins began promoting seminars for motivational speaker and author Jim Rohn when he was 17 years old. He subsequently learned to firewalk and incorporated it into his seminars.

Robbins has worked on an individual basis with Bill Clinton, Justin Tuck, Hugh Jackman, and Pitbull. He has counseled American businessmen Peter Guber, Steve Wynn, and Marc Benioff.

In July 2010, NBC debuted "Breakthrough with Tony Robbins", a reality show that followed Robbins as he helped the show's participants face their personal challenges. NBC canceled the show after airing two of the planned six episodes due to low viewership. In March 2012, the OWN Network picked up the show for another season beginning with the original first season set to re-run and thereafter leading directly into the new 2012 season. In April 2012, Robbins began cohosting Oprah's Lifeclass on the OWN Network.

In 2015, filmmaker Joe Berlinger directed and produced the documentary Tony Robbins: I Am Not Your Guru, about the Tony Robbins event "Date with Destiny" after filming it in Boca Raton, Florida, in December 2014. It premiered at the South by Southwest film festival in March 2016.
data.name: Tony Robbins

data.biography: Yuen Biao (Chinese: 元彪, born 26 July 1957) is a Hong Kong actor and martial artist. Along with Peking Opera School "brothers" at the China Drama Academy, Sammo Hung and Jackie Chan, he was  a member of the"Seven Little Fortunes" performance troupe in Yu Jim-Yuen's China Drama Academy's Peking Opera School. data.biography: 元彪（1957年7月26日－），原名夏令震，是香港动作演员，七小福成员之一。7岁入于占元开办的中国戏剧学院学习京剧，取艺名“元彪”。10岁起就作为儿童演员参加影视演出。70年代曾参演李小龙的《精武门》、《龙争虎斗》以及胡金铨的《忠烈图》，也曾参演邵氏的《天涯明月刀》《流星蝴蝶剑》《三少爷的剑》等古装武侠片。元彪常追随师兄洪金宝、成龙拍片。1979年他主演由洪金宝执导的《杂家小子》，一举成名。曾获香港金像奖最佳动作指导奖、台湾金马奖最佳武术指导奖。代表作品有：《A计划》、《快餐车》、《夏日福星》、《黄飞鸿》等。
data.name: 元彪

元彪（1957 年 7 月 26 日－），原名元彪，是香港動作演員，七小福成員之一。7 歲入於佔元開辦的中國戲劇學院學習京劇，取藝名“元彪”。10 歲起就作為兒童演員參加影視演出。70 年代曾參演李小龍的《精武門》、《龍爭虎鬥》以及胡金銓的《忠烈圖》，也曾參演邵氏的《天涯明月刀》《流星蝴蝶劍》《三少爺的劍》等古裝武俠片。元彪常追隨師兄洪金寶、成龍拍片。1979 年他主演由洪金寶執導的《雜家小子》，一舉成名。曾獲香港金像獎最佳動作指導獎、台灣金馬獎最佳武術指導獎。代表作品有：《A 計劃》、《快餐車》、《夏日福星》、《黃飛鴻》等。

data.biography:
Yuen Biao, Hong Konglu bir aktör, dövüş sanatları ustası ve dublör olup, özellikle Jackie Chan ve Sammo Hung ile birlikte rol aldığı aksiyon filmleriyle tanınmaktadır. 26 Temmuz 1957'de Hong Kong'da doğan Biao, Çin Drama Akademisi'nde eğitim aldı ve burada Jackie Chan ile çocukluk arkadaşı oldu.

Kariyeri

Yuen Biao, Hong Kong aksiyon sinemasının en atletik aktörlerinden biri olarak kabul edilir. Kariyerine Bruce Lee'nin "Enter the Dragon" (1973) filminde dublör olarak başladı. Daha sonra Knockabout (1979) ve The Prodigal Son (1981) gibi filmlerle büyük çıkış yaptı.

Öne Çıkan Filmleri

- The Prodigal Son (1981) – Wing Chun dövüş sanatlarını konu alan klasik bir yapım.

- Project A (1983) – Jackie Chan ile birlikte rol aldığı aksiyon filmi.

- Eastern Condors (1987) – Vietnam Savaşı temalı aksiyon filmi.

- Once Upon a Time in China (1991) – Jet Li ile birlikte rol aldığı tarihi dövüş filmi.

- Shanghai Noon (2000) – Jackie Chan ile birlikte aksiyon sahnelerini düzenlediği Hollywood yapımı.

Etkisi ve Tarzı

Biao, hızlı ve akrobatik dövüş sahneleriyle aksiyon sinemasına büyük katkı sağlamıştır. Jackie Chan ve Sammo Hung ile birlikte Hong Kong aksiyon sinemasının altın çağını şekillendiren isimlerden biri olarak kabul edilir.
data.name: Yuen Biao

Miles Hugh Barrett Jupp is an English comedian and actor. He began his career as a stand-up comedian.

He was educated at three independent schools: the Hall School in Hampstead, London;  St George's School in Windsor, and then at Oakham School in Rutland. He went on to study Divinity at the University of Edinburgh in Scotland and now lives in Monmouthshire, Wales.

Haya Nakazaki (中崎 敏, Nakazaki Haya, nacido en 1991) es un actor japonés nacido en Hokkaido.

A la edad de 3 años se mudó a los EE. UU. y vivió en Hawái hasta los 7 años. De regreso en Japón, vivió en Sapporo, Hokkaido hasta terminar la escuela secundaria, tras lo cual se mudó a Tokio para estudiar en la Universidad de Keio. Comenzó a actuar en cortometrajes durante sus años universitarios y comenzó a aspirar a convertirse en actor. En 2013, estudió en la Academia de Cine de Nueva York en los EE. UU. por un corto período y comenzó una actividad de actuación a gran escala. Apareció en una largometraje por primera vez en Chigasaki Story (dir Takuya Misawa) en 2015. Desde entonces, ha aparecido en varias películas como Teiichi no kuni (dir. Akira Nagai), Demekin (dir. Yoshitaka Yamaguchi), The Outsider (Netflix, dir. Martin Zandvliet) y Woder Wall (dir. Yuki Maeda). Más recientemente, ha aprecido en películas como The Murders of Oiso (dir. Takuya Misawa) y We Made a Beautiful Bouquet (dir. Nobuhiro Doi).

Samuel Anderson (born 1982) is an English actor. He played the role of police officer Ross Kirk in Emmerdale up until early 2009.

He originated the role of Crowther in the 2004 National Theatre production of Alan Bennett's play The History Boys and subsequently performed the same role in the Broadway, Sydney, Wellington and Hong Kong productions and radio and film versions.

As well as stage performances, Anderson's television appearances include BAFTA award winning BBC Three comedy Gavin & Stacey – playing recurring character Fingers – and BBC Four TV comedy Stuck.

data.biography:
Samuel Anderson (nascido em 1982) é um ator inglês. Ele desempenhou o papel do policial Ross Kirk em Emmerdale até o início de 2009.

Ele originou o papel de Crowther na produção de 2004 do National Theatre da peça de Alan Bennett, The History Boys, e posteriormente desempenhou o mesmo papel nas produções da Broadway, Sydney, Wellington e Hong Kong e em versões para rádio e cinema.

Além das performances no palco, as aparições de Anderson na televisão incluem a comédia da BBC Three ganhadora do prêmio BAFTA Gavin & Stacey - interpretando o personagem recorrente Fingers - e a comédia da BBC Four TV Stuck.

data.name: William Houston

data.biography:
Central School of Speech and Drama'da eğitim gören Houston, Troilus ve Cressida'daki Troilus , Henry IV'ün her iki bölümündeki Prens Hal ve Henry V'deki (Bir Akşam için aday gösterildi) baş roller de dahil olmak üzere birçok önde gelen klasik sahne rolü oynadı. Standart Tiyatrosu En İyi Erkek Oyuncu Ödülü), Ben Jonson bireyin Sejanus ve Coriolanus , tüm Kraliyet Shakespeare Company ; İçinde Pentheus / Agave Sir Peter Hall 's üretimi Euripides ' Bacchai Ulusal Tiyatrosu'nda. Iain Glen'in yerini aldı.başrol Fortune Fool Ocak 2014 den Eski Vic'de Mayıs ve Temmuz 2014 yılları arasında tarafından Shakespeare'in Titus Andronicus'un Titus yönetilmez oynanan Lucy Bailey de Shakespeare'in Globe Theatre .  Nisan 2009'da Robin Hood'un üçüncü sezonunun ikinci bölümü olan " Neden ve Etki " de rol aldı . Ayrıca BBC'nin Elizabeth Gaskell'in 'Kuzey ve Güney' uyarlamasında Daniela Denby-Ashe ve Richard Armitage ile birlikte Boucher karakterini oynadı. BBC'nin Yaralı 1909 ve 1907 serisinde Dr. Millias Culpin olarak görünür.

Guy Ritchie'nin (William Houston olarak anıldı) yönettiği 2009 filmi Sherlock Holmes'da Robert Downey, Jr ve Jude Law ile birlikte Constable 'Clarky' Clarke'ı canlandırdı ve 2011'de devam filmi Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows'da bu rolü tekrarladı . O çalıştı Software 2011 adlı için DLC Harikulade Chester olarak ses döküm için Karanlık Ruhlar , Kral Vendrick 2014 en Dark Souls 2 ve yeniden yayımlama Birinci Sin Bilgin . Ayrıca 2015'te Bloodborne'da NPC'ler Emekli Avcı Djura ve Kapı Bekçisini ve isteğe bağlı patron düşmanını seslendirdi.Oceiros, Tüketilen Kral yılında Dark Souls III 2016 yılında.

2020'de BBC draması The Salisbury Poisonings'de Ted Daszkiewicz'i canlandırdı .

data.biography: Vanessa Nicole Marano is an American actress. She has starred in movies and had recurring roles on Without a Trace, Gilmore Girls,  Scoundrels, and The Young and the Restless.
data.name: Vanessa Marano

data.biography:
Vanessa Nicole Marano (Los Angeles, 31 de outubro de 1992), mais conhecida simplesmente por Vanessa Marano, é uma atriz norte-americana.

Atuou como Bay Kennish na série da ABC Family, Switched at Birth.Ela é irmã da também atriz Laura Marano.

Vanessa Marano começou a atuar no teatro quando tinha sete anos, atuando em diversas peças na ACT em Agoura Hills, Califórnia. Ela começou sua carreira profissional com diversos comerciais nacionais.

Marano é mais reconhecida por seus papéis, como April, a filha de Luke em Gilmore Girls e o papel de Francesca, a filha do Prêmio Emmy Lisa Kudrow, na série original da HBO The Comeback . Recentemente, ela estrelou em Canalhas que interpreta uma filha em intrigas, escola saltando de Virginia Madsen. Ela teve papéis em séries como Dexter, Without a Trace, Trust Me, e The Young and the Restless. Também incluem Parenthood, Medium, Ghost Whisperer, Vidas Passadas, Six Feet Under, Malcolm in the Middle e Grounded for Life.

data.biography: Justin Drew Bieber (born March 1, 1994) is a Canadian singer. He was discovered by American record executive Scooter Braun and signed with RBMG Records in 2008, gaining recognition with the release of his debut seven-track EP My World (2009) and soon establishing himself as a teen idol.
data.name: Justin Bieber

data.biography:
Justin Drew Bieber nasceu em 1º de março de 1994 no St. Joseph's Hospital em London, Ontário, Canadá e foi criado em Stratford, Ontário. Ele é filho de Pattie Mallette e Jeremy Bieber . Ele é descendente de franco-canadenses, irlandeses, alemães, ingleses e escoceses. Ele tem três meio-irmãos mais novos por meio de seu pai.

Ao crescer, ele mostrou um grande interesse pela música e aprendeu sozinho a tocar vários instrumentos, incluindo violão, bateria, piano e trompete. Sua mãe começou a postar vídeos dele se apresentando musicalmente no YouTube. Os vídeos logo conquistaram fãs e chamaram a atenção do agente de talentos Scooter Braun . Braun foi capaz de garantir uma audição improvisada com Usher, que ficou impressionado e ajudou Bieber a assinar um contrato com uma gravadora.

Em 2009, seu primeiro single, "One Time", foi um sucesso mundial e foi certificado como Platina no Canadá e nos Estados Unidos. Isso foi seguido por seu primeiro álbum EP, "My World", que também foi um sucesso internacional. Ele se tornou o primeiro artista a ter sete canções de uma parada de discos de estreia na Billboard Hot 100.

Em 2010, ele lançou seu primeiro álbum de estúdio completo, My World 2.0. Ele também lançou um filme-concerto de sucesso, Justin Bieber: Never Say Never (2011).

data.biography: 李强，中国内地影视男演员。1984年，出演爱情片《姑娘小伙正当年》，从此开始演艺事业。1989年，出演剧情片《侨乡情》。1994年，在都市情感剧《京都纪事》中饰演林飞，从而在影视领域崭露头角。1995年，出演战争片《飞虎队》。1998年，在古装剧《水浒传》中饰演西门庆，从而受到关注。2002年，出演刑侦剧《誓言无声》。2003年，在刑侦悬疑剧《红色康乃馨》中饰演杨源辉。2005年，出演古装剧《江山风雨情》。2006年，在战争片《东江特遣队》中饰演刘子良。2009年，出演谍战剧《誓言永恒》。2013年，在抗战革命剧《光荣使命》中饰演马长天。2015年，出演都市励志剧《明天你好》。2016年，在都市商战剧《猎场》中饰演袁昆。
data.name: 李强

data.biography: 李強，中國內地影視男演員。1984 年，出演愛情片《姑娘小夥正當年》，從此開始演藝事業。1989 年，出演劇情片《僑鄉情》。1994 年，在都市情感劇《京都紀事》中飾演林飛，從而在影視領域嶄露頭角。1995 年，出演戰爭片《飛虎隊》。1998 年，在古裝劇《水滸傳》中飾演西門慶，從而受到關注。2002 年，出演刑偵劇《誓言無聲》。2003 年，在刑偵懸疑劇《紅色康乃馨》中飾演楊源輝。2005 年，出演古裝劇《江山風雨情》。2006 年，在戰爭片《東江特遣隊》中飾演劉子良。2009 年，出演諜戰劇《誓言永恆》。2013 年，在抗戰革命劇《光榮使命》中飾演馬長天。2015 年，出演都市勵志劇《明天你好》。2016 年，在都市商戰劇《獵場》中飾演袁昆。

data.biography: Yoo Seung-ho (유승호) is a South Korean actor. Born on August 17, 1993, he got his start in commercials and began working as a child actor at the age of 7. He became famous overnight with his first film role in “The Way Home” in 2002, after which he became known as “Korea’s Younger Brother.” His many film and television roles that have followed have solidified Yoo Seung Ho’s star status. Some of his more recent roles include “Queen Seon Deok” (2009), “Flames of Desire” (2010), “Master of Study” (2010), “Warrior Baek Dong Soo” (2011), “Arang and the Magistrate” (2012), “Imaginary Cat” (2015), “Remember” (2015-2016) and “I Am Not a Robot” (2017-2018).
data.name: Yoo Seung-ho

data.biography: 俞承豪（유승호）是韩国演员。他出生于1993年8月17日，从广告开始，7岁开始从事童星工作。2002年，他凭借在《回家的路》中的第一个电影角色一夜成名，之后他被称为“韩国的弟弟”。随后的多部影视角色巩固了柳承浩的明星地位。他最近的一些角色包括“善德女王”（2009 年）、“欲望之火”（2010 年）、“学习大师”（2010 年）、“战士白东秀”（2011 年）、“阿郎与裁判官”（2012 年）、“想象中的猫”（2015 年）、“记住”（2015-2016 年）和“我不是机器人”（2017-2018 年）。
data.name: 俞承豪

郑希，1982年5月11日出生，中国著名配音导演、配音演员。

2019年在动画电影《姜子牙》为姜子牙配音， 电视剧《不一样的美男子》中为张翰配音，动画片《少年锦衣卫》第二季中为花道常配音。2013年爱情电影《在一起》为甄子丹饰演的陈国华配音，2015年奇幻冒险电影《道士下山》为张震饰演的查老板配音，同年喜剧电影《爱我就陪我看电影》为吴镇宇饰演的姚星杰配音。

2016年在刘涛主演都市职场女性剧《欢乐颂》担任配音导演。2019年2月，古装神话剧《三生三世宸汐缘》为张震饰演的九宸配音，同年8月，犯罪动作电影《沉默的证人》为张家辉饰演的陈嘉豪配音。
data.name: 郑希

鄭希，1982 年 5 月 11 日出生，中國著名配音導演、配音演員。

2019 年在動畫電影《姜子牙》為姜子牙配音， 電視劇《不一樣的美男子》中為張翰配音，動畫片《少年錦衣衞》第二季中為花道常配音。2013 年愛情電影《在一起》為甄子丹飾演的陳國華配音，2015 年奇幻冒險電影《道士下山》為張震飾演的查老闆配音，同年喜劇電影《愛我就陪我看電影》為吳鎮宇飾演的姚星傑配音。

2016 年在劉濤主演都市職場女性劇《歡樂頌》擔任配音導演。2019 年 2 月，古裝神話劇《三生三世宸汐緣》為張震飾演的九宸配音，同年 8 月，犯罪動作電影《沉默的證人》為張家輝飾演的陳嘉豪配音。

data.biography:
Рики Уиттл — британский актёр и модель. Родился 31 декабря 1981 года в городе Олдем (Большой Манчестер, Великобритания). Сын бывшего военнослужащего Королевских военно-воздушных сил ямайского происхождения Гарри Уиттла и британки Мэгги Гудвин. В юности увлекался спортом, представлял Англию и Великобританию на молодёжных соревнованиях по футболу, регби и лёгкой атлетике. Из-за полученной травмы пришлось забыть о спортивной карьере. После окончания школы поступил в университет Солент в Саутгемптоне, чтобы оплатить учёбу, начал работать моделью. В 2009 году занял второе место в британской версии шоу «Танцы со звёздами».

Некоторые факты о личной жизни Рики Уиттла:

В 2007 году начал встречаться с американской актрисой Карли Стенсон, коллегой по сериалу «Холлиокс». Отношения продолжались более трёх лет, в 2011 году пара рассталась.

В августе 2012 года на церемонии MTV Video Music Awards актёр познакомился с американской актрисой Джессикой Зор, звездой сериала «Сплетницы». Между актёрами завязался бурный роман, но год спустя молодые расстались.

В 2014 году Уиттл три месяца встречался с актрисой Румер Уиллис, старшей дочерью Брюса Уиллиса и Деми Мур. Согласно газете The Sun, причиной разрыва стал слишком плотный график актёра — на тот момент Рики работал по 12–15 часов на съёмках телешоу «Сотня».
data.name: Рики Уиттл

data.biography:
Sean Michael O'Bryan (born September 10, 1963) is an American film and television actor. He co-starred with William Ragsdale on the short-lived series Brother's Keeper.

Early television work includes guest roles on television series in Married... with Children, MacGyver, Northern Exposure, Cold Case, Diagnosis: Murder, Quantum Leap, Murder, She Wrote, Chicago Hope, Roswell, Roseanne, Criminal Minds, The King of Queens and Dexter. More recent television guest star credits include CSI, Bones, Melissa & Joey, Lie to Me, Hot In Cleveland, The Mentalist, Leverage, Glee, NCIS: LA, Superstore, and 9-1-1: Lone Star.

He's had recurring roles on TV series including  the sitcom Pig Sty, Six Feet Under, Abby, The Middle, and Love, Victor. He had a major recurring role as Bill Blackham on Persons Unknown.

His film credits include Chaplin, Crimson Tide, Phenomenon, Exit to Eden, Out to Sea, Big Fat Liar, Deck the Halls, I'll Be Home For Christmas, Yes Man, Vantage Point, both Princess Diaries films, Playing for Keeps, Olympus Has Fallen, London Has Fallen, Table 58, Mother's Day, Searching, and Rust Creek.
data.name: Sean O'Bryan

data.biography:
Andrew Lincoln (born Andrew James Clutterbuck; September 14, 1973) is an English actor. His first major role was as the character Egg in the BBC drama This Life (1996–1997). Lincoln later portrayed Simon Casey in the Channel 4 sitcom Teachers (2001–2003), Mark in the Christmas-themed romantic comedy film Love Actually (2003) and Dr. Robert Bridge in the ITV television series Afterlife (2005–2006).

Beginning in 2010, Lincoln gained international fame for his portrayal of Rick Grimes, the lead character on the hit AMC post-apocalyptic horror television series The Walking Dead. For his portrayal of Rick Grimes, Lincoln won the Saturn Award for Best Actor on Television in 2015 and 2017. He departed the cast of The Walking Dead in 2018, but reprised the role of Rick in the 2024 Walking Dead Spin-off, The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live.
data.name: Andrew Lincoln

data.biography:
Andrew Lincoln (geboren als Andrew James Clutterbuck; 14. September 1973) ist ein englischer Schauspieler. Seine erste größere Rolle war die des ‚Egg‘ in dem BBC-Drama „This Life“ (1996-1997). Später spielte Lincoln den ‚Simon Casey‘ in der Channel-4-Sitcom „Teachers“ (2001-2003), ‚Mark‘ in der romantischen Weihnachtskomödie „Tatsächlich … Liebe“ (2003) und ‚Dr. Robert Bridge‘ in der ITV-Fernsehserie „Afterlife“ (2005-2006).

Ab 2010 erlangte Lincoln internationale Bekanntheit durch seine Darstellung von ‚Rick Grimes‘, der Hauptfigur in der erfolgreichen postapokalyptischen AMC-Horror-Fernsehserie „The Walking Dead“. Für seine Darstellung von Rick Grimes wurde Lincoln 2015 und 2017 mit dem Saturn Award als bester Fernsehschauspieler ausgezeichnet. Er verließ die Besetzung von The Walking Dead im Jahr 2018, wird aber seine Rolle als Rick in einer Trilogie von The Walking Dead-Filmen wieder aufnehmen, die von Universal Pictures veröffentlicht werden sollen.

Эндрю Линкольн (англ. Andrew Lincoln, род. 14 сентября 1973, Лондон, Великобритания) — английский актёр кино и телевидения. Широкая популярность пришла с выходом на экраны телесериала «Ходячие мертвецы», где он сыграл главную роль лидера группы выживших — Рика Граймса.  Эндрю Джеймс Клаттербак (псевдоним — Линкольн) родился 14 сентября 1973 года в Лондоне, в семье медсестры из южной Африки и британца инженера-строителя. Он вырос в местечке под названием Халл, но в 10 лет его семья переехала на новое место жительства в Bath.

После окончания школы «Beechen Cliff School», Эндрю принял участие в Королевской академии драматического искусства (RADA), где он сменил свою фамилию с Клаттербак на Линкольн. Его старший брат Ричард Клаттербак — директор школы Санкт-Лоренса в Брэдфорд-на-Эйвоне, основанной в 2011 году.

Эндрю Линкольн дебютировал на экране в фильме «Drop the Dead Donkey». Широкая популярность пришла с выходом на экраны телесериала «Ходячие мертвецы», где сыграл главную роль Рика Граймса — бывшего помощника шерифа и лидера небольшой группы выживших. Также он прославился после выхода на экраны телевизионной драмы BBC «Эта жизнь». Эндрю Линкольн озвучил не один фильм в Великобритании, также стал голосом рекламных роликов на радио.

10 июня 2006 года он женился на Гаэли Андерсон, дочери солиста рок-группы «Jethro Tull» Иэна Андерсона. В 2007 у Гаэль Андерсон и Эндрю Линкольна родилась дочь Матильда, а в 2009 сын Артур.
data.name: Эндрю Линкольн

data.biography:
Estudou na Academia Real de Artes Dramáticas (Rada, sigla em inglês). Ganhou fama ao interpretar um advogado iniciante e avoado na famosa série de comédia dramática ''This Life'', da BBC, exibida no Brasil. Depois deste sucesso participou de vários filmes e séries da televisão, entre eles ''Os Gângsteres/Gangster No. 1'', ao lado de Malcolm McDowell. O ano de 2001 marcou o começo do trabalho de Lincoln por três anos na comédia dramática ''Teachers'', que mais tarde ele mesmo dirigiu e pela qual foi indicado aos prêmios Bafta, também exibida no Brasil.

Em 2003 integrou o elenco da comédia romântica de Richard Curtis ''Simplesmente Amor/Love Actually''. Ao longo da carreira interpretou vários papéis de sucesso no teatro, sendo o mais recente o mulherengo Dale em ''Parlour Song'', de Jez Butterworth e o amplamente elogiado ''Blue/Orange''

Em 10 de Junho de 2006, Lincoln se casou com Gael Anderson, filha do vocalista Ian Anderson, da banda Jethro Tull. Eles têm dois filhos.

Em 2010, junto com Vanessa Paradis, fez ''Como Arrasar um Coração /Heartbreaker'', a refilmagem do filme francês'' L’Arnacoeu''r.

Hoje é claro o ator britânico é muito mais conhecido por seu papel de Rick Grimes (personagem principal), na já clássica série de TV ''The Walking Dead''.

Em 2014, foi eleito o Favorite TV Anti-Hero,pelo ''People's Choice Awards, USA''; e em 2015, ele foi eleito o melhor ator em uma série de televisão pela ''Academy of Science Fiction, Fantasy & Horror Films, USA''.

Ендрю Лінкольн (англ. Andrew Lincoln, народ. 14 вересня 1973, Лондон, Велика Британія) — англійський актор. Відомий своїми ролями у телесеріалах «Це життя», «Вчителі», «Потойбічне життя» і кінофільмах «Реальна любов» та «Серцеїд». Широка популярність прийшла з виходом на екрани телесеріалу «І мертві підуть», де зіграв головну роль — шерифа Ріка Граймса.
data.name: Ендрю Лінкольн

data.biography: Andrew James Clutterbuck (14 de septiembre de 1973), mejor conocido por su nombre artístico Andrew Lincoln, es un actor británico. Su primera actuación televisiva importante la obtuvo en el drama de la BBC This Life (1996-1997), aunque es popularmente conocido por haber interpretado a Rick Grimes en la serie de televisión The Walking Dead de la cadena AMC (2010-2018) y por su rol principal en la comedia británica Teachers (2001-2004), como Simon Casey.

Andrew Lincoln, né Andrew James Clutterbuck le 14 septembre 1973 à Londres, est un acteur anglais. Fils d'un ingénieur civil anglais et d'une infirmière sud-africaine, il grandit à Hull puis à Bath, où il fréquente la Beechen Cliff School. Passionné de théâtre dès l'adolescence, il intègre la Royal Academy of Dramatic Art (RADA) et adopte son nom de scène en hommage à Abraham Lincoln. Ses débuts télévisés remontent à 1994 dans Drop the Dead Donkey, suivis de son premier grand rôle d'Egg dans la série BBC This Life (1996-1997).

Il se fait remarquer dans la sitcom Teachers (2001-2004, où il réalise deux épisodes, nommé aux BAFTA), puis au cinéma dans Love Actually (2003, rôle de Mark et sa scène iconique des pancartes). Autres apparitions notables : Strike Back (2010), Afterlife (2005, Golden Nymph Award), Wuthering Heights (2009), Penguin Bloom (2020). Sa carrière explose avec Rick Grimes, shérif survivant dans l'apocalypse zombie de The Walking Dead (2010-2018, 9 saisons), rôle qui lui vaut deux Saturn Awards du meilleur acteur TV (2015, 2017), un Satellite Award et un People's Choice Award. Il quitte la série pour sa famille, mais reprend le personnage dans le spin-off The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live (2024, avec Danai Gurira), acclamé pour sa profondeur émotionnelle. En 2025, il tease un possible retour dans l'univers TWD et prête sa voix à Rick dans le DLC World War Z (2026). Récemment, il tient le rôle principal de John dans le thriller Coldwater (ITV/Paramount+, 2025-2026), un personnage sombre et tourmenté contrastant avec Grimes.

Marié depuis 2006 à l'actrice Gael Anderson (fille du musicien Ian Anderson de Jethro Tull, rencontrée sur Teachers), il est père de deux enfants, Matilda (2007) et Arthur (2010), et vit discrètement en Angleterre. Acteur charismatique aux accents sudistes maîtrisés malgré son origine britannique, il excelle dans les rôles intenses et humains, mêlant théâtre (Blue/Orange, Parlour Song), TV et voix-off. (787 caractères)

Andrew Lincoln (doğum adıyla Andrew James Clutterbuck), 14 Eylül 1973 tarihinde Londra, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Prestijli Royal Academy of Dramatic Art (RADA) okulunda oyunculuk eğitimi alarak sanat hayatına sağlam bir temel atmıştır. Kariyerine 1990'ların ortasında başlayan Lincoln, İngiltere'de kısa sürede tanınan bir yüz haline geldi. Özellikle BBC'nin çığır açan draması "This Life" (1996-1997) dizisindeki Edgar "Egg" Cook rolüyle büyük bir çıkış yakaladı. Ardından Channel 4'un sevilen dizisi "Teachers"ta (2001-2003) canlandırdığı Simon Casey karakteriyle İngiliz televizyonundaki yerini sağlamlaştırdı.

Uluslararası alanda tanınırlığını ise Richard Curtis'in yönettiği ve bir modern klasik haline gelen "Aşk Her Yerde" (Love Actually) (2003) filmiyle kazandı. Filmde canlandırdığı Mark karakteri ve özellikle ikonik "sessiz kartlar" sahnesindeki performansıyla dünya çapında milyonların hafızasında yer edindi. Bu rol, onun dramatik ve romantik rollerdeki yeteneğini gözler önüne serdi.

Ancak Lincoln'ı küresel bir fenomene dönüştüren ve kariyerini tanımlayan rol, AMC'nin efsanevi dizisi "The Walking Dead"de (2010-2018) canlandırdığı Rick Grimes karakteri oldu. Dokuz sezon boyunca dizinin tartışmasız başrolü ve ahlaki merkezi olan Lincoln, bir şerif yardımcısının medeniyetin çöküşü sonrası hayatta kalma mücadelesini ve liderliğe evrilen karmaşık yolculuğunu olağanüstü bir derinlikle canlandırdı. Performansı, eleştirmenlerden büyük övgü topladı ve onu televizyonun en saygın aktörlerinden biri yaptı. Ailesiyle daha fazla vakit geçirmek için dokuzuncu sezonda ana diziden ayrıldı.

Yıllar süren bekleyişin ardından Lincoln, 2024 yılında yayınlanan ve Rick Grimes'ın hikayesini devam ettiren "The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live" adlı mini dizide başrolü Danai Gurira ile paylaşarak ikonik rolüne geri döndü. Bu proje, karakterin hikayesine bir devam niteliği taşıdı. "The Walking Dead" evreni dışındaki çalışmalarına da devam eden Lincoln, Guillermo del Toro'nun Netflix için hazırladığı "Cabinet of Curiosities" (2022) adlı antoloji dizisindeki performansıyla da beğeni topladı.

data.biography:
David James Stuart Mitchell (born 14 July 1974) is a British comedian, actor and writer. Mitchell rose to prominence alongside Robert Webb as part of the comedy duo Mitchell and Webb. The duo starred in the Channel 4 sitcom Peep Show, in which Mitchell plays Mark Corrigan. He won the British Academy Television Award for Best Comedy Performance in 2009 for his performance. Mitchell and Webb have written and starred in several sketch shows including Bruiser, The Mitchell and Webb Situation, That Mitchell and Webb Sound and That Mitchell and Webb Look. They have also starred in the British version of Apple's "Get a Mac" ad campaign. Their first film, Magicians, was released in 2007. They starred in the short-lived TV series Ambassadors in 2013, and in the Channel 4 comedy-drama Back from 2017 to 2021.

Mitchell starred as Owen in the BBC Radio 4 sitcom Think the Unthinkable and as William Shakespeare in the BBC Two historical comedy Upstart Crow. He has starred in the BBC One detective comedy-drama Ludwig since 2024. He is a frequent participant on British panel shows, being a team captain on Would I Lie to You?, the host of The Unbelievable Truth on BBC Radio 4 and the former host of The Bubble and Was It Something I Said?, as well as guesting on other panel shows including QI, The Big Fat Quiz of the Year, Mock the Week, 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown and Have I Got News for You. He was also a co-host of the comedy news show 10 O'Clock Live. As a writer, he contributes opinion pieces to British newspapers The Observer and The Guardian.
data.name: David Mitchell

data.biography:
David James Stuart Mitchell (nacido el 14 de julio de 1974) es un comediante, actor y escritor británico. Mitchell saltó a la fama junto a Robert Webb como parte del dúo cómico Mitchell and Webb. El dúo protagonizó la comedia de Channel 4, Peep Show, donde Mitchell interpreta a Mark Corrigan. Ganó el Premio de la Academia Británica de Televisión a la Mejor Interpretación de Comedia en 2009 por su actuación. Mitchell y Webb han escrito y protagonizado varios programas de sketches, como Bruiser, The Mitchell and Webb Situation, That Mitchell and Webb Sound y That Mitchell and Webb Look. También protagonizaron la versión británica de la campaña publicitaria "Get a Mac" de Apple. Su primera película, Magicians, se estrenó en 2007. Protagonizaron la serie de televisión de corta duración Ambassadors en 2013 y la comedia dramática Back, de Channel 4, de 2017 a 2021.

Mitchell interpretó a Owen en la comedia de BBC Radio 4 Think the Unthinkable y a William Shakespeare en la comedia histórica Upstart Crow, de BBC Two. Ha protagonizado la comedia dramática detectivesca Ludwig, de BBC One, desde 2024. Participa con frecuencia en programas de debate británicos, siendo capitán del equipo en Would I Lie to You?, presentador de The Unbelievable Truth en BBC Radio 4 y expresentador de The Bubble y Was It Something I Said?, además de participar como invitado en otros programas de debate como QI, The Big Fat Quiz of the Year, Mock the Week, 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown y Have I Got News for You. También fue copresentador del programa de noticias cómicas 10 O'Clock Live. Como escritor, colabora con artículos de opinión en los periódicos británicos The Observer y The Guardian.

data.name: Cực Phẩm Xứng Đôi - The Perfect Match
data.overview:
Cực Phẩm Xứng Đôi: kể về cuộc so tài giữa nữ vương chợ đêm Vệ Phân Thanh với đầu bếp siêu cấp Hoắc Đình Ân. Đối với Vệ Phân Thanh thì chợ đêm là toàn bộ cuộc sống của cô, sự kiêu ngạo lớn nhất của cô chính là việc tự mình nghĩ ra cách kiếm tiền từ thức ăn ngon ở chợ đêm, được tất cả bạn bè trên mạng khen ngợi, được cho là sánh ngang với thực đơn của nhà hàng đẳng cấp ba sao.

Còn đối với Hoắc Đình Ân mà nói, nhà hàng là mục tiêu cuộc sống duy nhất của anh, món ăn mà anh tạo ra được ca ngợi đến mức dù cho có phải bay qua Thái Bình Dương đê thưởng thức thì cũng đáng giá, phương pháp chế biến càng được xem là tuyệt chiêu độc môn.

data.biography:
Philippe "Bouli" Lanners (born 20 May 1965 in Moresnet-Chapelle, in the Redeemed Cantons near Liège, Belgium) is a Belgian actor, author and film director. He is also known as a painter.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Bouli Lanners , licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Bouli Lanners

data.biography:
Philippe Lanners, dit Bouli Lanners, est un comédien, scénariste, metteur en scène et réalisateur belge et luxembourgeois francophone.  Il naît le 20 mai 1965 à Moresnet-Chapelle, non loin du tripoint de la frontière avec l’Allemagne et les Pays-Bas et grandit à La Calamine, une des neuf communes de langue allemande de Belgique, située sur la frontière et ancien territoire neutre (entre 1816 et 1919).

Après un bref passage à l'Académie royale des beaux-arts de Liège, il entame une vie faite de petits boulots et de débrouille, tout en continuant à peindre. Régisseur pour les Snuls, ceux-ci l'emploient occasionnellement comme acteur et peu à peu en font un personnage récurrent et populaire. Il commence alors sa carrière d'acteur en Belgique et en France.

En 1999, il écrit et réalise Travellinckx, un court métrage road-movie en super 8 noir et blanc, qui est projeté en festivals. Deux ans plus tard, le court métrage Muno est sélectionné à Cannes, à la Quinzaine des réalisateurs.

Son premier long métrage, Ultranova, est sorti en 2005 et primé au Festival de Berlin. Il tourne son deuxième long métrage Eldorado à l'été 2007, film qui sera sélectionné pour la Quinzaine des réalisateurs à Cannes 2008, où il décroche le prix Regards jeunes, le prix du label Europa Cinemas du meilleur film européen de la semaine de la critique et le prix FIPRESCI. L'année suivante, le film est nommé pour le César du meilleur film étranger

Son troisième long métrage, Les Géants, a reçu deux prix à la Quinzaine des réalisateurs du Festival de Cannes 2011, le prix de la Société des auteurs et compositeurs dramatiques et le prix Art Cinema Award, remis par la Confédération internationale des cinémas d'art et d'essai.

Les Premiers, les Derniers, son quatrième long métrage, est sélectionné par le Panorama au festival de Berlin en 2016 et récolte deux prix. Il obtient le prix Label Europa Cinema du meilleur film Européen et le prix œcuménique.

En 2019 il écrit et réalise Nobody Has To Know, son cinquième long métrage qu'il tourne en Écosse, sur l'île de Lewis, en langue anglaise avec Michelle Fairley dans le rôle titre. Il s'associe à Tim Mielants pour assurer ensemble la co-réalisation sur le plateau.  Le film est en sélection officielle au Toronto International Film Festival.

Parallèlement, il continue de peindre et donne des cours à l'Institut national supérieur des arts du spectacle et des techniques de diffusion à Bruxelles.

Il habite à Liège avec son épouse Élise Ancion, scénariste, metteuse en scène et costumière.

Source: Article "Bouli Lanners" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

data.biography:
Джонни Кристофер Стронг родился 12 ноября 1979 года в Лос-Анджелесе, штат Калифорния и является американским актером и музыкантом. Уже в семь лет он научился читать ноты и начал изучать боевые искусства. В 12 лет Джонни взял гитару и в течение следующих десяти лет он самостоятельно научился играть на барабанах и фортепиано. Он подписал два крупных лейблов с "RCA" и "Atlantic Records", в результате чего выпустил три альбома.

Джонни Стронг начал свою карьеру в 1980 году как модель, а затем приступил к различным телевизионным выступлениям. в 1996 снялся в фильме Стивена Сигала "Мерцающий". Популярность ему принесла роль в фильме "Черный ястреб". В 2010 сыграл роль главную роль в фильме "Грешники и Святые".
data.name: Джонни Стронг

畢業於中華基督教會協和小學（1991 年上午校）、賽馬會官立中學及香港演藝學院戲劇學院，獲藝術學士（榮譽）學位，主修表演，是香港男子戲劇表演組合暨獨立樂隊朱淩淩成員，職位是吉他手，同時活躍於舞台劇場表演和樂團演出。

曾憑舞台劇《情迷老闆娘》獲提名香港舞台劇獎最佳男配角。2007 年，其所屬樂團朱淩淩獲得叱吒樂壇流行榜頒獎典禮叱吒樂壇生力軍組合銀獎、新城勁爆頒獎禮新城勁爆新登場組合及第八屆華語音樂傳媒大獎最佳新樂團。2015 年憑電影《踏血尋梅》獲得第 19 屆富川國際奇幻電影節特別表揚男演員獎，並同時獲得第 52 屆金馬獎及第 35 屆香港電影金像獎最佳男配角和最佳新演員提名，最終獲得金馬獎男配角獎、金像獎最佳男配角和最佳新演員。

白只的前女友是同為藝人的顏卓靈，二人於 2016 年承認戀情，但年紀相差 14 年，一直不被外界看好，結果在 2023 年分手。
data.name: 白只

data.biography: Bruna Reis Maia (born August 4, 1995), better known as Bruna Marquezine, is a Brazilian actress. Marquezine began her television career in 2000. Since then she has acted in many Brazilian shows and films. She played her first role in an English-speaking film when she played Roseli in Breaking Through (2015). However, her biggest role in Hollywood has been her role in Blue Beetle (2023), when she played Jenny Kord, the love interest of Jaime Reyes.
data.name: Bruna Marquezine

data.biography: Bruna Reis Maia conocida mundialmente como Bruna Marquezine, es una actriz brasileña, que alcanzó la fama desde su primer personaje en telenovelas, a los 8 años, como Salete, en Mujeres apasionadas y se convirtió en la actriz infantil más premiada de Brasil.

Bruna Reis Maia (née le 4 août 1995), mieux connue sous le nom de Bruna Marquezine, est une actrice brésilienne.  Marquezine a commencé sa carrière à la télévision en 2000. Depuis, elle a joué dans de nombreuses émissions et films brésiliens.  Elle a joué son premier rôle dans un film anglophone en incarnant Roseli dans Breaking Through (2015).  Cependant, son plus grand rôle à Hollywood a été son rôle dans Blue Beetle (2023), lorsqu'elle incarnait Jenny Kord, l'amoureuse de Jaime Reyes.

Bruna Reis Maia (ur. 4 sierpnia 1995), lepiej znana jako Bruna Marquezine, to brazylijska aktorka. Marquezine rozpoczęła karierę telewizyjną w 2000 roku. Od tego czasu zagrała w wielu brazylijskich serialach i filmach. Swoją pierwszą rolę w filmie anglojęzycznym zagrała Roseli w Breaking Through (2015). Jednak jej największą rolą w Hollywood była rola w Blue Beetle (2023), w której zagrała Jenny Kord, ukochaną Jaime'a Reyesa.

data.biography: Tom Riis Farrell was born in Oceanside, New York. He attended Union College in Schenectady, New York, earning a BA in Theatre in 1981. His first film was Regarding Henry (1991), but he was edited out. Most recently, he appeared off-Broadway in The Resistible Rise of Arturo Ui, starring Al Pacino, Charles Durning, Tony Randall, John Goodman, Steve Buscemi, and Paul Giamatti. Prior to that, he was in the Broadway, San Francisco, Pasadena, and touring productions of Claudia Shear's play "Dirty Blonde," receiving a Helen Hayes Award and a Joseph Jefferson Award nomination for that performance. Other Broadway and Off-Broadway credits include "1776" (Roundabout and Gershwin Theatres); "Wrong Mountain" (Eugene O'Neill Theatre); "Li'l Abner" (Encores! at City Center); and "View of the Dome" (NY Theatre Workshop). Tom shows up in the movies Trust the Man (2005), Marie and Bruce (2004), The Stepford Wives (2004), Almost Famous (2000), Bringing Out the Dead (1999), The Out-of-Towners (1999), The Devil's Advocate (1997) and Sleepless in Seattle (1993). Television work includes Ed (2000), NYPD Blue (1993), Spin City (1996), four episodes of Law & Order (1990) and one of Law & Order: Criminal Intent (2001), as well as the television movies The Love Letter (1998) with Campbell Scott and Jennifer Jason Leigh, and The Deliverance of Elaine (1996) with Mare Winningham, Chris Cooper, and Lloyd Bridges.
data.name: Tom Riis Farrell

data.biography: Erich von Stroheim (September 22, 1885 – May 12, 1957) was a multifaceted Austrian-American actor, director, and writer known for his contributions to cinema during the silent film era. He was renowned for his meticulous attention to detail as a director and for portraying intense, often morally ambiguous characters on screen. Stroheim gained fame for directing and starring in films like "Greed" and "The Merry Widow." His style was marked by elaborate storytelling and a commitment to realism. Stroheim's career was impactful, though often marked by conflicts with studios due to his uncompromising vision, which led to some of his films being heavily edited against his wishes.
data.name: Erich von Stroheim

data.biography: Erich Oswald Hans Carl Maria von Stroheim, nascido Erich Oswald Stroheim,(Viena, 22 de setembro de 1885 - 12 de maio de 1957) foi um diretor, ator e produtor austríaco-americano, mais conhecido como estrela de cinema e vanguarda, diretor visionário do cinema mudo. era. Seu filme de 1924 Greed (uma adaptação do romance de 1899 de Frank Norris , McTeague ) é considerado um dos melhores e mais importantes filmes já feitos. Após confrontos com os chefes dos estúdios de Hollywood, Stroheim achou difícil encontrar trabalho como diretor e, posteriormente, tornou-se um ator respeitado, principalmente no cinema francês.

Erich Oswald Hans Carl Maria von Stroheim (Viena, Àustria, 22 de setembre de 1885 - Maurepas, França, 12 de maig de 1957) va ser un director, guionista, actor i productor austríac-nord-americà, més conegut com a estrella de cinema i director visionari avantguardista, de l'època del cinema mut.

Eric Oswald Stroheim, dit Erich von Stroheim, est un acteur, scénariste, réalisateur et écrivain américain d'origine austro-hongroise, né le 22 septembre 1885 à Vienne (Autriche) et mort le 12 mai 1957 à Maurepas (France).

Il fut un des réalisateurs les plus ambitieux de l'époque du cinéma muet (Queen Kelly, Folies de femmes, Les Rapaces, etc.). Jugés extravagants et souvent mutilés par les producteurs, ses films ont depuis été reconsidérés par la critique. Partageant sa carrière entre les États-Unis et la France, c'est cependant en tant qu'acteur qu'il demeure dans les mémoires notamment pour ses interprétations d'un officier allemand dans La Grande Illusion de Jean Renoir (1937) ou d'un metteur en scène déchu aux côtés de Gloria Swanson dans Boulevard du crépuscule de Billy Wilder (1950).

Son enfance et sa formation restent obscures, sa biographie autorisée étant assez fantaisiste. Né Eric Oswald Stroheim, de Benno Stroheim et Johanna Bondy, un couple de juifs pratiquants, il se déclare comte Eric Oswald Marc Hans Carl Maria von Stroheim und Nordenwall, fils d'un notable autrichien catholique. S'il semble avoir travaillé quelque temps dans l'atelier de chapeaux de paille de son père, sa carrière militaire, souvent évoquée, n'est pas avérée.

Il émigre aux États-Unis en 1909 sans but précis, grâce au financement d'un oncle.

Après avoir exercé divers métiers, il arrive à Hollywood en 1914, où très vite il entame une carrière d'assistant-réalisateur, notamment auprès de D. W. Griffith sur le tournage d'Intolérance. Avec l'avènement de la Première Guerre mondiale, Stroheim se voit confier une multitude de rôles d'officiers prussiens et l'acteur s'impose sous le slogan: «l'homme que vous aimerez haïr». La fin du conflit met un terme provisoire à sa carrière d'acteur. Il se lance alors dans la réalisation, se révélant un metteur en scène ambitieux et visionnaire, sur un mode pessimiste et cynique. Dès son premier film, La Loi des montagnes (1919), ses obsessions sont manifestes: l'argent, le sexe et l'infirmité. Avec Folies de femmes (1921), il brosse un portrait au vitriol d'une société corrompue par l'argent. Perfectionniste, il exige que les armoires et les commodes, qui ne sont pas une seule fois ouvertes, soient remplies de vêtements. Avec La Veuve joyeuse (1925), il détourne une opérette pour en faire un film sur les orgies dans une cour royale avec infirmes, obsédés sexuels et monarques dégénérés.

Le tournage Queen Kelly avec Gloria Swanson en 1928 ne déroge pas à la règle mais des différends financiers et éditoriaux (la censure jugeant certaines scènes trop osées) avec Joseph Kennedy, coproducteur et associé de Swanson, poussent le réalisateur au départ. Kennedy déclare: «On ne doit jamais plus permettre à Stroheim de diriger un film». ...

Source: Article "Erich von Stroheim" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

生于维也纳，20世纪初来到美国。1914年进入好莱坞，次年开始在影片中出演角色。第一次世界大战后，于1919年独立导演了其处女影片《盲目的丈夫》，指出妇女若婚姻生活不幸有权另寻爱情。1923-1925年完成《贪婪》，原长达10小时，表达了金钱使人堕落的意旨，剪辑后仍被认为是一部经典之作。1934年赴欧洲，主要在法国拍片，直到40年代初期返回好莱坞。1951年以《日落大道》获得奥斯卡最佳男配角提名，之后又赴法国。1957年5月12日死于癌症。其它代表性导演影片主要还有《魔鬼的万能钥匙》、《愚蠢的妻子》、《风流寡妇》等；出演的主要影片还有《飞往月球》、《世界的心》、《口蜜腹剑》、《铁血空军》、《风尘艳姬》、《苏军血战记》、《里斯本风暴》等。
data.name: 埃里克·冯·施特罗海姆

data.biography: 埃裏希·馮·斯特羅海姆（1885 年 9 月 22 日 - 1957 年 5 月 12 日）是一位多才多藝的奧地利裔美國演員、導演和作家，以其在無聲電影時代對電影的貢獻而聞名。作為導演，他以對細節的一絲不苟的關注以及在銀幕上刻畫激烈的、往往在道德上模稜兩可的角色而聞名。斯特羅海姆因執導和主演《貪婪》和《風流寡婦》等電影而聲名鵲起。他的風格以精心講故事和對現實主義的承諾為標誌。斯特羅海姆的職業生涯是有影響力的，盡管由於他不妥協的願景，經常與製片廠發生衝突，這導致他的一些電影被大量編輯，違背了他的意願。
data.name: 埃裏希·馮·斯特羅海姆

data.biography: Juul Vrijdag (28 juli 1956) is een Nederlands toneel-, televisie- en filmactrice, voornamelijk bekend van kleinere rollen.  Haar televisie- en filmcarrière begon begin jaren '90 met de film Stroomopwaarts, waarin acteurs als Gees Linnebank en Geert de Jongwaren te zien. Daarna volgden (gast)rollen in Aletta Jacobs: Het hoogste streven, Zeeuws Meisje, fl 19,99, Baantjer, Russen, Spoorloos verdwenenen De Daltons, de jongensjaren. Ze speelde in de films Otje (1998),Noordeloos (2001), De Passievrucht (2003), Verder dan de maan (2003),Alles is Liefde (2007) en New Kids Nitro (2011).  In 2008 had ze als Rietje van de Horst een hoofdrol in het tweede seizoen van de serie Klein Holland, met onder andereMartin van Waardenberg en Juliette van Ardenne.  In 2009 is ze als oma te zien in de kinderfilm Kikkerdril. In 2013 vertolkte ze een gastrol in Danni Lowinski, als Jannie.
data.name: Juul Vrijdag

data.biography:
William Michael Hootkins was born on July 5, 1948, in Dallas, Texas. He moved to London, England in the early '70s and lived there up until 2002. Hootkins was an actor at Theatre Intime while attending Princeton University where he learned how to speak fluent Mandarin Chinese. He also trained as an actor at the London Academy of Music and Dramatic Arts, and attended St. Marks, where he was in the same theater group as Tommy Lee Jones. The imposingly bulky and heavyset Hootkins first began acting in films and TV shows alike in the mid '70s. His more noteworthy parts include the first of the Rebel fighter pilots to get killed while attacking the Death Star in "Star Wars", scientist Topol's bumbling oaf assistant in "Flash Gordon", Major Eaton, sent by the US government in "Raiders of the Lost Ark", one of Rod Steiger's demented sons in "American Gothic", a corrupt police lieutenant in "Batman", a disgusting sleazy voyeur in "Hardware", a coarse South African police chief in "Dust Devil", the mysterious and duplicitous Mr. X in "Hear My Song", a haughty corporate executive in "Death Machine", Santa Claus in "Like Father, Like Santa", and an opera-singing vampire in "The Breed". Moreover, Hootkins had small parts in two "Pink Panther" pictures: he's a taxi driver in both "The Trail of the Pink Panther" and "Curse of the Pink Panther".

Among the TV shows he did guest spots on are "Yanks Go Home", "Agony", "Play for Today", "Tales of the Unexpected", "The Life and Times of David Lloyd George", "Brett Maverick", "Cagney and Lacey", "Taxi", "Hammer House of Mystery and Suspense", "Poirot", "Chancer", "The Young Indiana Jones Chronicles", "The Tomorrow People", "The West Wing", and "Absolute Power". Hootkins received many accolades for his outstanding performance as Sir Alfred Hitchcock in Terry Johnson's hit play "Hitchcock Blonde". In addition to his substantial film and TV credits, Hootkins was also a popular and prolific voice artist who recorded dozens of plays for BBC Radio Drama; he supplied the voices for such iconic individuals as Orson Welles, J. Edgar Hoover, and Winston Churchill. William Hootkins died of pancreatic cancer on October 23, 2005.  IMDb Mini Biography
data.name: William Hootkins

data.biography: From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.  Joshua Baret "Josh" Henderson  (born October 25, 1981) is an American actor and singer. He rose to fame as one of the male members of Scene 23, a pop singing group that were selected as the winners of The WB's singing competition Popstars 2. After the group disbanded, he began focusing on an acting career. His most high-profile role to date has been that of Austin McCann on the ABC hit television series Desperate Housewives. On October 10, 2008, TVGuide.com reported that Henderson will be joining the cast of 90210 as Sean, the biological son of Harry Wilson and Tracy Clark who turned out to be a con artist. data.biography: 约书亚·巴雷特·亨德森（Joshua Baret “Josh” Henderson，1981年10月25日-），美国演员、歌手。他作为 Scene 23 的男性成员之一而声名鹊起，Scene 23 是一个流行歌唱团体，被选为 WB 歌唱比赛 Popstars 2 的获胜者。组合解散后，他开始专注于演艺事业。迄今为止，他最引人注目的角色是 ABC 热门电视连续剧《绝望的主妇》中的奥斯汀·麦肯。2008 年 10 月 10 日，TVGuide.com 报道称，亨德森将加入 90210 的演员阵容，饰演哈里·威尔逊和特雷西·克拉克的亲生儿子肖恩，他原来是一名骗子。

data.biography: Born Liu Kuo-Yung in 1946, Jason Pai Piao has starred in many films. However, all of them failed to garner much attention. It wasn't until 1975, when Pai signed a contract with Hong Kong's newly founded television station CTV, that he became a household name with a string of popular costume martial arts TV series. Following CTV's demise in 1978, Pai starred in series for other stations and made a triumphant return to Shaw Brothers. From 1979 until the mid-1980's, he was one of the studio's busiest action stars with as many as five releases annually. In the 1990's, he continued to have major roles in action series and movies like "King Of Robbery".
data.name: Jason Pai Piao

data.biography:
白彪，原名劉國榮，暱稱彪叔，香港男演員，於 1976 年在佳藝電視劇集《射鵰英雄傳》及《神鵰俠侶》飾演郭靖而為人所認識。2021 年，他憑劇集《香港愛情故事》「陳漢聲」一角於《萬千星輝頒獎典禮 2020》奪得「最佳男配角」獎，亦是該獎項設立至今最年長（76 歲）的得獎者。白彪的胞弟是香港著名武術指導兼演員劉允（魚頭允），武術師父則為已故演員林蛟。

白彪是香港電視史上其中一位曾服務所有有持續自製原創電視劇之電視台的大滿貫藝人。

白彪在 1968 年聽從兄長建議報讀邵氏電影公司招考武師技能訓練班，結果獲得取錄，同期同學計有韓國材、楊澤霖、狄龍、陳觀泰、鄧光榮以及高雄等人。1969 年起任職電影武師，隨劉家良班底接洽香港與台灣的電影。直至 1972 年轉投「長江影業」，簽約為旗下電影演員 3 年。1976 年由任職電視台的朋友、電視劇監製林念萱介紹，加入佳藝電視，因劇集《射鵰英雄傳》及《神鵰俠侶》（參演《神鵰俠侶》時仍未跟佳藝電視簽約）飾演郭靖一角而大獲好評，其郭大俠形象更深入民心，以至廿年後無線電視重拍《神鵰俠侶》再找白彪飾演中年版郭靖，且得到廣泛成年觀眾受落和關注。

在佳藝電視結業後，白彪先回歸邵氏兄弟，再加入麗的電視，於 1989 年被電視台高層邀請轉至無綫電視，1990 年全家移民加拿大多倫多，此後他不時返回香港工作。他於 1995 年在重拍的《神鵰俠侶》再次飾演郭靖，因此角而為中國內地觀眾熟悉。於 2001 年重返亞洲電視數年，曾經改藝名為白標。2008 年，重返無綫電視拍攝《學警狙擊》，2012 年轉投香港電視網絡。他近年多在中國內地拍攝電視劇，至 2017 年為了人情味回到香港為 ViuTV 拍攝電視劇《詭探》。

2019 年 5 月與無綫簽部頭合約。2020 年 12 月 7 日晚，白彪在無綫電視四線劇集《愛·回家之開心速遞》（20:00 播出）、《使徒行者 3》（20:30 播出）、《踩過界 II》（21:30 播出）及《香港愛情故事》（22:30 播出）均有參與演出，並於同一晚均有出場，被網民戲稱為「白彪之夜」。同年，他在劇集《香港愛情故事》飾演「陳漢聲」一角而受關注，並憑此劇奪得《萬千星輝頒獎典禮 2020》「最佳男配角」獎，演技獲肯定。由於致謝詞太長，最後要司儀鄭裕玲煞停對白。
data.name: 白彪

data.overview: Đại bàng tinh của Phật Tổ tự ý xuống trần gian, gây ra bao tội ác. Phật Tổ phái sứ giả Hàng Long đuổi theo, thu phục nó. Một cuộc chiến thảm khốc diễn ra, vô tình tạo nên mối lương duyên của năm trăm năm sau. Nhờ gợi ý của cao tăng, Duyên tìm lại được bạn thân năm xưa Phương Chí Bằng (do Thẩm Chấn Hiên đóng). Anh cũng làm quen và kết oan gia với nữ bộ khoái Tô Nhu (do Thang Lạc Văn đóng). Dần dần, giữa Nhi, Duyên và Nhu hình thành mối tình tay ba đầy vương vấn. Tuy nhiên, khung cảnh yên bình của làng quê nhanh chóng bị xáo trộn khi yêu ma hoành hành. Cũng từ đó, Duyên dần ngộ ra kiếp trước của mình chính là sứ giả Hàng Long. Anh đành gác lại mọi tục niệm ái tình, quyết tâm tu hành, lấy pháp danh Đạo Tế để thay trời hành đạo, hoàn thành sứ mệnh mà Phật Tổ đã giao phó..

data.biography: 邓兆尊（英语：Johnny Tang Siu-chun，1967年2月5日－），生于香港，籍贯广东顺德，香港男艺人，已故粤剧名伶新马师曾与洪金梅之长子。曾在无线电视演出综合性节目，包括已停播的《欢乐今宵》，由于他身型瘦削，常在趣剧中模仿其他名人或饰演被欺负的角色（但也擅长演反派），及在情景喜剧《皆大欢喜》中演出。邓兆尊曾与一同在《皆大欢喜》里合演夫妇的陈彦行传出绯闻。另外邓兆尊在奖门人系列中经常有突出的表现。因为其父亲新马师曾被称为慈善伶王，所以邓兆尊也被戏称为慈善羚羊。
data.name: 邓兆尊

data.biography: 鄧兆尊，生於香港，籍貫廣東順德，香港男藝人，已故粵劇名伶新馬師曾與洪金梅之長子。曾在無綫電視演出綜合性節目，包括已停播的《歡樂今宵》，由於他身型瘦削，常在趣劇中模仿其他名人或飾演被欺負的角色（但也擅長演反派），及在情境喜劇《皆大歡喜》中演出。鄧兆尊曾與一同在《皆大歡喜》裏合演夫婦的陳彥行傳出緋聞。另外鄧兆尊在獎門人系列中經常有突出的表現。因為其父親新馬師曾被稱為慈善伶王，所以鄧兆尊也被戲稱為慈善羚羊。
data.name: 鄧兆尊

data.biography:
Fulton-Smiths Mutter war eine deutsche Fremdsprachenkorrespondentin, sein Vater ein britischer Jazzmusiker, der später als Übersetzer arbeitete.

Er wuchs zweisprachig auf. Im Jahr 1986 legte er das Abitur am Camerloher-Gymnasium Freising ab. Seine Ausbildung zum Schauspieler absolvierte er von 1987 bis 1990 an der Otto-Falckenberg-Schule in München. Seit dem 24. September 2004 war er mit der Schauspielerin Verena Klein verheiratet. Sie haben zwei Töchter (* 2009, * 2012) und wohnen in München. Ende April 2017 gaben sie öffentlich ihre Trennung bekannt.

Nachdem er zuvor vor allem in leichteren Unterhaltungsfilmen auftrat, spielte er 2014 in Die Spiegel-Affäre den früheren bayerischen Ministerpräsidenten Franz Josef Strauß und nahm dafür unter ärztlicher Aufsicht 20 kg zu. Am 13. November 2014 wurde er für diese Rolle mit einem Bambi ausgezeichnet.
data.name: Francis Fulton-Smith

data.biography:
Cha Rae‑hyung (born June 16, 1984) is a South Korean actor under Artist Company trained in Acting at Sejong University's Film and Performing Arts Department. After graduating, he built a foundation in theatre, performing in numerous Daehak‑ro productions such. He went on to appear in various independent films and short productions before gaining industry attention in 2016 with The Boys Who Cried Wolf, where his distinctive and textured performance positioned him as a rising "scene stealer" in Korean cinema.

Cha Rae‑hyung has since developed a steady career across film and television. He is frequently cast as figures of authority—police officers, detectives, correctional officers—but has also portrayed tougher characters, including gang members, most notably in The Worst of Evil, where his physical and expressive intensity stood out.
data.name: Cha Rae-hyung

data.biography: Cha Rae‑hyung (차래형, nacido el 16 de junio de 1984) es un actor surcoreano formado en Interpretación en la Facultad de Cine y Artes Escénicas de la Universidad de Sejong. Tras graduarse, desarrolló una intensa actividad teatral en Daehak-ro, participando en diversos montajes. Posteriormente trabajó en numerosos cortometrajes y películas independientes, hasta que en 2016 llamó la atención del sector cinematográfico con 양치기들 («The Boys Who Cried Wolf»), donde su interpretación —de carácter marcado y muy matizada— le valió el reconocimiento como un nuevo «robaplanos» del cine coreano. Desde entonces ha desarrollado una carrera constante tanto en cine como en televisión. En pantalla suele encarnar figuras de autoridad —policías, detectives, guardias de prisiones—, aunque también ha interpretado personajes más duros, como matones, especialmente en 최악의 악 («El peor de los males»), donde destacó por su intensidad física y expresiva.
data.name: Cha Rae-hyung

馮曉文，香港女演員、歌手，曾為香港無綫電視藝員，於 1990 年代初出道。

馮曉文於 1992 年畢業於第五期藝員進修班，同學有葉振聲和鄭應龍。早年經常演出音樂影片。曾獲 TVB 選為《沖天小子》擔任女主角，其後更有唱片公司向她招手，第一首派台歌為《你還記得我嗎》。2004 年，她離開無綫電視，轉至中國大陸發展。較注目的演出包括歌手郭富城代表作《對你愛不完》的音樂影片、張衞健《西遊記》中的玉面狐狸一角、陳小春《鹿鼎記》中的蘇荃一角。
data.name: 馮曉文

data.biography: Michael Hogan is a Canadian actor of Irish descent. He is notable for numerous roles in TV and film over the past five decades, such as Colonel Saul Tigh in the Battlestar Galactica re-imagining or Billy in The Peanut Butter Solution. Hogan also lent his voice to some video games characters, with the most famous being Doc Mitchell in Fallout: New Vegas and Armando-Owen Bailey in the Mass Effect series.
data.name: Michael Hogan

data.biography: Michael Hogan (1 de enero de 1949) es un actor canadiense.

Michael Hogan (* 13. März 1949 in Kirkland Lake, Ontario) ist ein kanadischer Schauspieler.  Hogan begann seine Schauspielkarriere im Jahr 1978. Er wirkte besonders häufig in kanadischen und später amerikanischen Fernsehproduktionen und -serien mit. Größere Bekanntheit erlangte er mit den Filmen Solitaire, für den er einen Genie Award erhielt, und Die Rache des Wolfes.

Im deutschsprachigen Raum ist er vor allem für seine Darstellung des XO Saul Tigh in der Fernsehserie Battlestar Galactica bekannt. Weiter hatte Hogan Gastauftritte in anderen Serien wie im Pilotfilm von Monk oder Folgen von Dollhouse und Smallville.

Hogan ist mit der Schauspielerin Susan Hogan verheiratet. Das Paar hat drei Kinder, ein Sohn Gabriel Hogan und ihre Tochter Jennie Rebecca Hogan sind ebenfalls als Schauspieler tätig. Susan und Michael Hogan spielten auch gemeinsam als Ehepaar, so wiederkehrend in der Serie The L Word – Wenn Frauen Frauen lieben die Eltern von Dana Fairbanks (Erin Daniels) und 2010 in einer Folge Warehouse 13 als Eltern der Hauptfigur Myka Bering, gespielt von Joanne Kelly.

data.biography:
Park Yong-woo (Korean: 박용우; born March 16, 1971) is a South Korean actor.

Park Yong-woo's father was an engineering professor and his mother was a music teacher. As a child he was shy and expressed himself poorly. Instead, he nurtured his imagination. When he first chose to become an actor, Park felt hampered by the fact that he didn't have any childhood or family trauma to draw from, but later realized that a vivid imagination was the key to his acting process because it didn't require him to show his "naked face."
data.name: Park Yong-woo

data.biography: 朴埇佑是作为MBC第24期公开招募的演员出道，在热门剧集《公寓》中扮演的追求崔真实的富家公子聚集了人们的目光，通过《陷阱》以及《生死谍变》中的配角登上大屏幕。2005年的大型古装惊悚恐怖片《血与泪》让观众见识到了朴埇佑散发个性的演技，2006年《甜蜜阴森的恋人》中他饰演了一位活在失败的初恋的阴影下的大学老师，将男人的双重性刻画得入骨入髓。2005年 第4届大韩民国电影大赏 优秀男配角赏。第13届春史大赏电影节 男配角赏。2003年 KBS演技大赏优秀演技赏。
data.name: 朴埇佑

data.biography: 樸埇佑是作為 MBC 第 24 期公開招募的演員出道，在熱門劇集《公寓》中扮演的追求崔真實的富家公子聚集了人們的目光，透過 通過《陷阱》以及《生死諜變》中的配角登上大屏幕。2005 年的大型古裝驚悚恐怖片《血與淚》讓觀眾見識到了樸埇佑散發個性的演技，2006 年《甜蜜陰森的戀人》中他飾演了一位活在失敗的初戀的陰影下的大學老師，將男人的雙重性刻畫得入骨入髓。2005 年 第 4 屆大韓民國電影大賞 優秀男配角賞。第 13 屆春史大賞電影節 男配角賞。2003 年 KBS 演技大賞優秀演技賞。
data.name: 樸埇佑
